description_context: Operator noticed strip edge curling up during slitting and coming close to his hand position. Safety guard gap was wider than specification due to wrong adjustment after blade change.

tasks.title: Review and update blade change checklist to include guard gap measurement.

sipoc.Input: Previous blade change records of CNC-101A, previous incident information
sipoc.Process: Checking guard gap and ensuring it meets specifications after the new adjustment.
sipoc.Output: Improved safety guards on all CNC-101A machines for future use
sipoc.Customer: Night shift operator and all operators using CNC-101A

tasks.title: Training of the night shift operator on proper blade change procedures.

sipoc.Supplier: Night shift operator, CNC-101A machine user
sipoc.Input: Incident report and records of incorrect guard gap setting during blade change.
sipoc.Process: Blade change checklist for proper execution, including a visual check on the guards.
sipoc.Output: Correct behavior demonstrated by the night shift operator in future blade changes to prevent similar incidents.

tasks.title: Visual inspection of all guard positions before each machine change.

sipoc.Supplier: Operator, night shift, all operators using CNC-101A machines
sipoc.Input: Incident report and records of incorrect guard gap setting during blade change.
sipoc.Process: Before every blade change on CNC-101A machines, check the guards for proper position according to the checklist.
sipoc.Output: Improved safety measures ensuring all guards are correctly positioned at each shift to prevent future incidents.

tasks.title: Regular inspection and maintenance of safety guard systems by the night shift operator.

sipoc.Supplier: Night shift operator, CNC-101A machine user
sipoc.Input: Incident report and records of incorrect guard gap setting during blade change.
sipoc.Process: Regular inspection and maintenance of all safety guards on CNC-101A machines to ensure they are in good working condition.
sipoc.Output: Increased reliability of the entire manufacturing process due to improved guarding measures.

tasks.title: Implement a system for immediate notification and response when an incident like this occurs again.

sipoc.Supplier: Operator, night shift, all operators using CNC-101A machines
sipoc.Input: Incident report and records of incorrect guard gap setting during blade change.
sipoc.Process: Develop a system for rapid response upon detection of an incident like the one reported in INC-2024-001.
sipoc.Output: Preventive measures put into place to quickly address any recurrence of similar incidents.

tasks.title: Training of the shift supervisors on recognizing and managing safety issues during machine changes.

sipoc.Input: Incident report and records of incorrect guard gap setting during blade change.
sipoc.Process: Training shift supervisors on recognizing signs of potential safety issues before any incidents occur.
sipoc.Output: Shift supervisors better equipped to take prompt action in addressing operational safety concerns, including preventing future incidents.

tasks.title: Establish a system for immediate review and analysis of all incident reports related to equipment modifications or changes.

sipoc.Supplier: Night shift operator, CNC-101A machine user
sipoc.Input: Incident report and records of incorrect guard gap setting during blade change.
sipoc.Process: Review all incident reports related to equipment modifications or changes for systematic analysis to identify best practices and potential solutions.
sipoc.Output: Identified lessons learned that can be applied across all manufacturing processes to improve safety measures.

description_context: Operator Ravi Shankar got a minor cut on left hand index finger while handling formed tube sample. The tube had a sharp edge from incomplete scarfing.

t1.title: Implement Cut-Resistant Gloves for All Sample Handling

sipoc.Input: Non-specific to this incident type
sipoc.Process: Handling samples with sharp edges or tools
sipoc.Output: All sample handling areas equipped with cut-resistant gloves

t2.title: Procure Sample Inspection Tongs for Each Station

sipoc.Input: No input needed for procurement task
sipoc.Process: Sample inspection tongs available in designated stations
sipoc.Output: All sample handling stations equipped with Sample Inspection Tongs

description_context: During night shift, a hot pipe (approximately 800°C) rolled off the cooling bed onto the floor near the walkway. No person was in the immediate area at the time.

tasks.title: Perform initial investigation and record findings

sipoc.Supplier: Unknown (incidents may originate from various sources)
sipoc.Input: Incident ID: INC-2024-003, Machine: HTR-401A
sipoc.Process: Cooling bed maintenance and troubleshooting process
sipoc.Output: Inspection report completed, including root cause analysis and corrective actions

tasks.title: Re-torque cooling bed guide roller mountings

sipoc.Input: Inspection report, re-torque checklist
sipoc.Process: Cooling bed maintenance, lubrication application process
sipoc.Output: All cooling bed mountings re-torqued to specifications

tasks.title: Add torque check to periodic maintenance schedule (monthly)

sipoc.Input: Inspection report, PM checklist update
sipoc.Process: Machine maintenance planning and execution process
sipoc.Output: Regular torque check added to monthly scheduled tasks

tasks.title: Install physical barrier (steel curb) on walkway side of cooling bed

sipoc.Input: Inspection report, design drawings
sipoc.Process: Security and safety system implementation process
sipoc.Output: Physical barrier installed to prevent future incidents on walkway side of cooling bed

tasks.title: Develop comprehensive incident response plan (including training, procedures)

sipoc.Input: Incident ID: INC-2024-003, Root Cause analysis, Corrective Actions report
sipoc.Process: Incident response planning process
sipoc.Output: Comprehensive incident response plan developed and documented

tasks.title: Train personnel on corrective actions and preventive measures

sipoc.Input: Incident ID: INC-2024-003, Root Cause analysis, Corrective Actions report
sipoc.Process: Personnel training process
sipoc.Output: All personnel in the relevant area trained on corrective actions and preventive measures for similar incidents

tasks.title: Review incident response plan with plant management team

sipoc.Input: Comprehensive incident response plan developed in t5
sipoc.Process: Plan review and finalization process
sipoc.Output: Review completed with plant management, approved for implementation

tasks.title: Implement the reviewed incident response plan immediately

sipoc.Input: Comprehensive incident response plan approved in t5
sipoc.Process: Plan implementation process
sipoc.Output: Incident response plan is fully implemented and tested for effectiveness

tasks.title: Monitor the incident response plan effectiveness and make adjustments if necessary

sipoc.Input: Incident ID: INC-2024-003, Root Cause analysis, Corrective Actions report, Review of incident response plan effectiveness
sipoc.Process: Plan monitoring and evaluation process
sipoc.Output: All subsequent incidents are monitored for effectiveness against the implemented plan

tasks.title: Document final resolution tasks and communicate to all stakeholders involved in this incident

sipoc.Supplier: Incident Resolution team, Plant Personnel, Maintenance Contractor, Steel Installation contractor, Lubricant supplier, Plant Management
sipoc.Input: All incident documentation including resolution tasks, effectiveness monitoring report
sipoc.Process: Resolution Task Documentation and Communication Process
sipoc.Output: Final resolution document signed by all stakeholders

description_context: Arc flash at induction coil during startup. Coil-to-tube arc damaged coil surface. No personnel injury — operators were at safe distance per SOP.

tasks.title: Verify entry guide alignment during changeover procedures

sipoc.Input: Previous Alignment Check
sipoc.Process: Changeover Checklist Update
sipoc.Output: Corrective Action Completion

tasks.title: Install proximity sensor for tube misalignment detection

description_context: During coil lifting, sling slipped on one side causing the 12-ton coil to tilt approximately 15 degrees before crane operator lowered it back safely.

t1.title: Perform Pre-use Sling Inspection and Verification

sipoc.Input: Sling supplier provides new slings for the task.
sipoc.Process: All slings are inspected and verified by designated personnel. Sling colors may be assigned to identify damaged slings as a safety measure.
sipoc.Output: The quality assurance department will verify that all slings meet specifications before they are used again.
sipoc.Customer: Operations Management ensures that the task is completed with proper inspection and verification.

t5.title: Review and Update Training Program on Sling Use

t6.title: Monitor and Evaluate Sling Inspection Process

t7.title: Prepare for Next Incident with Revised Training Materials

description_context: Small fire in DG set room. Oil leak from DG fuel line dripped onto hot exhaust pipe, causing localized fire. Fire detected by security camera operator and responded within 2 minutes.

tasks.title: Review and update supplier's maintenance records for DG fuel hoses.

sipoc.Input: supplier's maintenance records for DG fuel hoses
sipoc.Process: review current practices and potential risks
sipoc.Output: updated supplier instructions on proper hose replacement schedule

tasks.title: Perform a detailed inspection of all DG fuel lines to identify any pinhole leaks.

sipoc.Input: all DG fuel lines for inspections
sipoc.Process: inspect each hose, including exhaust manifold connections
sipoc.Output: list of identified pinhole leaks and their locations

tasks.title: Replace all detected fuel hoses with new ones.

sipoc.Input: list of identified pinhole leaks and locations
sipoc.Process: replace affected hoses with new, approved ones
sipoc.Output: verified replacement hoses are installed correctly

tasks.title: Install a drip tray under all fuel connections.

sipoc.Input: all DG fuel connections for installation of drip trays
sipoc.Process: install new drip trays where necessary
sipoc.Output: confirmation that all drip trays are installed correctly and visible to maintenance staff

tasks.title: Install a fuel leak sensor with an alarm system.

sipoc.Input: new fuel leak sensor and alarm system
sipoc.Process: install the sensor on DG exhaust manifolds, ensuring it is not obstructed
sipoc.Output: sensor is installed correctly with audible alarm

tasks.title: Update the DG inspection schedule to include a hose condition check.

sipoc.Input: new or updated DG inspection schedule
sipoc.Process: revised current schedules to reflect hose replacement practices and additional condition checks
sipoc.Output: DG inspection records show updated check procedures

tasks.title: Schedule a maintenance workshop focusing on the DG fuel system.

sipoc.Input: no input required as it's an internal schedule
sipoc.Process: coordinate with supplier to ensure all equipment is prepared and ready for the workshop
sipoc.Output: workshop confirmation from supplier

tasks.title: Follow-up inspection of DG fuel lines after the workshop.

sipoc.Input: all DG fuel lines and hoses for inspections
sipoc.Process: inspect all replaced hoses to ensure they were correctly installed and operate as expected
sipoc.Output: verified that replacement hoses are operating properly, without leaks or issues

tasks.title: Train maintenance staff on the updated inspection and corrective actions.

sipoc.Input: training materials for maintenance staff
sipoc.Process: conduct training sessions to ensure all personnel are aware of the new inspection criteria and corrective actions
sipoc.Output: maintenance staff have received updated training on DG fuel system inspection and repairs

tasks.title: Notify maintenance staff about any additional tasks or reminders.

sipoc.Input: none
sipoc.Process: send reminder emails to all responsible parties with a list of next steps and deadlines
sipoc.Output: maintenance staff are informed about the incident details, tasks assigned, and reminders for future inspections

tasks.title: Monitor the effectiveness of corrective actions.

sipoc.Input: ongoing monitoring of DG hoses, fuel lines, and related systems for leaks or other issues
sipoc.Process: periodic checks to ensure the preventive measures are effective in preventing future incidents
sipoc.Output: results from ongoing inspections show no new instances of fuel leaks or hose-related issues

description_context: Coolant oil spill from forming mill coolant tank. Approximately 200 liters leaked due to tank drain valve left open after weekend maintenance.

tasks.title: Implement Post-Maintenance Checklists and Valve Security Protocols

sipoc.Input: Maintenance technicians, drain valves, padlocks
sipoc.Process: Ensuring all maintenance actions are documented and following security protocols for valve access.
sipoc.Output: Properly secured and recorded post-maintenance tasks and valves status

tasks.title: Ensure Post-Maintenance Checklist is Up to Date

sipoc.Input: Maintenance teams, post-maintenance checklist template
sipoc.Process: Reviewing the existing checklists and making necessary updates to include all required elements.
sipoc.Output: Updated post-maintenance checklist with proper valve status documentation

tasks.title: Properly Place Spill Response Kit Near Coolant Tanks

sipoc.Input: Spill response kit, coolant tanks
sipoc.Process: Locating and placing the spill response kit next to all coolant tanks to be used in case of future spills.
sipoc.Output: Kit easily accessible for quick response upon discovery of any leak or spill

tasks.title: Train Maintenance Teams on Proper Valve Use and Security Practices

sipoc.Input: Maintenance teams, new post-maintenance checklists and drill scripts
sipoc.Process: Training sessions are conducted to educate maintenance staff on the correct use of valves and how to react in case of an incident.
sipoc.Output: Maintainers trained with updated skills and knowledge of spill response procedures

tasks.title: Conduct a Review Meeting to Confirm Resolution Implementation

sipoc.Input: Reviewed and confirmed resolution details with all stakeholders (suppliers, teams, customers)
sipoc.Process: A review meeting is held to ensure that the implemented solutions are understood and agreed upon by all parties.
sipoc.Output: All stakeholders understand the new process for handling spills and securing valves effectively

description_context: Forklift nearly struck a pedestrian worker (EMP-036) at the intersection of packaging bay and finished goods yard. Forklift operator did not sound horn at blind corner.

tasks.title: Install convex mirror at blind corner Z6/FG yard intersection
Install speed bump at all intersections
Mandatory horn use policy in all operations
Mark pedestrian-only walkway with floor paint re-identification

description_context: Operator EMP-016 noticed that a co-worker (EMP-035, helper) entered Zone Z5 heat treatment area without wearing the required aluminized jacket and face shield.

sipoc.Process: System updates and displays the zone-entry PPE matrix at all zone entrances.

t2.title: New Workers Receive Zone-Specific PPE Briefing

sipoc.Process: The company ensures all new workers are briefed on zone-specific PPE requirements including aluminized jackets and face shields before assignment.

t3.title: Install PPE Check Station at Zone Entry

sipoc.Process: The company installs a PPE check station prominently visible at the entrance of Zone Z5.

t4.title: Train Safety Officers on Incident Prevention

sipoc.Process: Safety officers are trained to recognize and respond effectively to incidents like this involving new workers.
Safety teams visit zones regularly to ensure compliance with PPE and safety protocols.

sipoc.Input: Incident data for INC-2026-001
sipoc.Process: The company reviews the incident report to identify lessons learned and improvements needed.
The company updates the employee training manual to include new information on PPE requirements and safety procedures.
Zone managers are informed about the incident and its resolution measures.
A resolution plan is documented that includes all the tasks identified and their interdependencies.
The incident is officially closed based on the resolution plan.
A review of the incident report leads to an update on employee policies related to PPE and safety compliance.

description_context: Fire exit B path was blocked by stacked empty pallets for approximately 13 minutes during B-shift. Supervisor noticed during routine round.

tasks.title: Reinspect and repaint floor markings for fire exit B path in red with 'FIRE EXIT — KEEP CLEAR' text.
Create designated pallet storage zone with physical barriers.
Update safety round checklist to include fire exit check as a mandatory task every hour.
